lineEvidence: StremioIndexer.searchByQuery now correctly uses EpisodeTokenMatcher.context(fromQuery: query) and passes episodeContext?.season/episode to search() — episode filtering from query string is no longer dropped

LibraryCSVExportService.fetchRatings now correctly uses if dict[mediaId] == nil guard before assignment — since events are ordered DESC by createdAt (newest first), the first event per mediaId is kept, ensuring newest rating wins

detail: Revalidated as stale on current code: StremioIndexer no longer loses episode-context filtering in searchByQuery flow.
Revalidated as stale on current code: LibraryCSVExportService now preserves newest rating per mediaId.
No longer reproduces: immersive screen-size control posts `.immersiveControlCycleScreenSize` which is handled by `HDRISkyboxEnvironment` rather than requiring a PlayerView handler path.
No longer reproduces: DetailViewModel.loadDetail loads `mediaLibrary.watchHistory` before resolving initial season, so stale watchHistory is not read during initial selection anymore.
No longer reproduces: PlayerView cleanup now cancels `audioTrackRefreshTask` after AV playback setup, preventing stale delayed AV track refresh from mutating UI after teardown or stream switch.
No longer reproduces: TorBoxService.selectFiles now persists selectedFileIDsByTorrent and calls selectMatchingEpisodeFile.
No longer reproduces: Debrid providers no longer all use empty no-op selectFiles implementations, so the cross-provider blanket claim is stale.
No longer reproduces: stopPlayback now forwards activeEpisodeId into addToHistory when present.
No longer reproduces: pullHistory now passes episodeId into fetchWatchHistory when syncing history.
No longer reproduces: AIAssistantManager resolvedModelID now resolves via provider catalog/fallback IDs (not hardcoded speculative IDs) before configuring provider models.
No longer reproduces: ExternalPlayerRouting now keeps URL-safe components intact and supports `{raw_url}` fallback, so launch URLs are no longer malformed for HTTPS streams.
No longer reproduces: HDRI yaw backfill now writes a fallback orientation value instead of leaving `hdriYawOffset` permanently nil, so this finding is no longer present on current code.
No longer reproduces: APMP stereo format description cache keys now include mode and mode changes no longer reuse stale cached stereo metadata.
No longer reproduces: HeadTracker start/stop lifecycle handling has been tightened, removing the stale stop-time race observed in this finding.

No longer reproduces: `LibraryCSVExportSheet.swift` now delegates export to `LibraryCSVExportService.exportAll()` with no `encodeCSV(entries:historyEntries:)` call path; this finding references a removed/changed flow.
No longer reproduces: `DetailTorrentsSection` is present and used by `SeriesDetailLayout.torrentsSection`; the missing-component assertion is stale.
Revalidated as stale on current code: DetailViewModel resolves watch history before or during season initialization safely, so stale watch history is no longer read during initial season resolution.
No longer reproduces: LibraryCSVExportSheet now uses `LibraryCSVExportService.exportAll()` and no longer calls the prior `encodeCSV(entries:historyEntries:)` crash-prone path.
No longer reproduces: the component exists and is used by detail layout; the prior missing symbol assertion is stale.
No longer reproduces: subtitle download task is no longer applied to a switched stream without validating active stream context in current code.
